site.name: RankRadar
site.tagline: Real-time visibility of GitHub trending, AI models, and OpenRouter consumption
site.poweredBy: Powered by GitHub Search, Artificial Analysis & OpenRouter

home.intro: Three rankings in one view. Data refreshed daily from official APIs.
home.sectionGithubDesc: Top-starred repos by time window (1d / 7d / 30d / 90d / all-time).
home.sectionModelsDesc: Rankings by intelligence, coding, math, speed, pricing (543 models on Artificial Analysis).
home.sectionOpenRouterDesc: OpenRouter models ranked by tokens consumed (selected window).

github.title: GitHub Top by Window
github.subtitle: Top-starred repos - 1d, 7d, 30d, 90d, and all-time windows.
github.caveat: "Top new by window" measures popularity among newly-created repos - not trending with deltas (that would need historical snapshots in DB). Same as github.com/trending.

models.title: Top AI Models
models.subtitle: The three primary indices from Artificial Analysis (Intelligence, Coding, Agentic) plus extended views from the same official dataset (LLM Leaderboard, Top by Task, Fastest).
models.creator: Creator

openrouter.title: Top OpenRouter — Apps and Models
openrouter.subtitle: Public OpenRouter rankings: apps by token usage (Today / This week / This month) and models by consumption.

compare.title: Compare models
compare.subtitle: Pick up to 3 models and compare intelligence, coding, agentic, pricing and context window side-by-side.
compare.empty: Pick up to 3 models above and click Compare.

footer.credits: Data provided by GitHub Search, Artificial Analysis, OpenRouter, and OpenClaw.
